assertions.description: 33 components, AMS1117-3.3 LDO (+5V→+3V3), two TPS61160A boost LED drivers with inductors, DisplayPort bridge chip (U1=5022505191), USB-C connector (J2) all correctly extracted and classified.

U2=NE555 in SO-8 is used as a PWM oscillator for the backlight LEDs (PWM net connects to LEDC pins of the display bridge). The signal_analysis has no 'oscillator_circuits' or 'timer_circuits' detection for it. The NE555 is classified only as a generic IC with no circuit function identified.

U1 is a DisplayPort LVDS bridge IC with L0/L1/L2/L3 differential pairs (standard DisplayPort lanes) plus AUX channel. hdmi_dvi_interfaces returns empty even though differential pairs L0-L3 are correctly identified. This is a DisplayPort-specific interface that the detector does not handle.
